message:
feat(command,runtime,store,persist): expand command coverage, persistence, and store operations

- fr-command/lib.rs: major command implementation expansion with
  additional Redis command support across string, hash, set, sorted set,
  and server command families (+364 lines)
- fr-store/lib.rs: expand data store with additional sorted set
  operations, stream group support, and improved key expiration
  handling (+281 lines)
- fr-runtime/lib.rs: extend runtime with additional server state
  management, improved client tracking, and configuration handling (+270)
- fr-persist/lib.rs: expand persistence layer with additional RDB/AOF
  serialization support and snapshot management (+102 lines)
- Update conformance fixtures for connection, server, and stream
  command families to reflect expanded implementation
- Update admin command tests for new runtime behavior
- fr-server/main.rs: minor server integration updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
